name: is-it-alive
description: Monitor status pages and check if your favorite services are operational.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: check-status-pages
commands.title: Check Status Pages
commands.description: View live status, active incidents, and uptime history for monitored sites

title: Is It Alive?
author: alerix
